lore.english:
A girl from the UFS with psychic powers. After awakening her powers at a young age, she was trained at an experimental facility to harness her powers and use them in battle, and has been completing special missions such as fighting demons, etc. Has a bright and energetic personality, and she dreams of becoming a hero who vanquishes evil.

She possesses the psychic ability "Heaven's Wheel (Angel Saucer)", which allows her to generate discs of light and control them freely. The suit she wears is custom-made for her at the laboratory, designed to work in conjunction with Heaven's Wheel to provide additional capabilities such as shielding and flight.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Angel Saucer[-]
skills.description:
Throws an Angel Saucer at the enemy, attacking [A:9001] time(s).
Removes [&DmgBlockCount] from the target hit at a [&Color_Cyan][R:900102]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Throws an Angel Saucer at the enemy, attacking [A:9001] time(s).
Removes [&DmgBlockCount] from the target hit at a [R:900102]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Hero Vibes[-]
skills.description:
Removes 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] on [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] upon using the skill.
Fills [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:900202]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:900202]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Removes 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] on [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] upon using the skill.
Fills [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by ([V3:900202]%) at a [R:900202]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Ultimate Angel Saucer[-]
skills.description:
Makes 5 Angel Saucers and fires them all at once toward the enemy.
Everytime a [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack] lands, reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:900202]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:900302]%[-] chance.
If the target has all [&Common_Word_Skill_DotDmg] type [&DeBuff]s, increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:900303]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
Makes 5 Angel Saucers and fires them all at once toward the enemy.
